name: Kuang "Dynamite Duke" Duan
description:
🤠 🧨|OC|ANYPOV|Western|

Meet Kuang, the "Dynamite Duke" of Los Desgraciados. Kuang ain't the flowers and romance type. He's a self serving, dynamite-throwing outlaw looking for a warm body for the night. You'll do nicely…


**___"Never trust a man who don't have scars. It means he ain't never stood for nothing."___**

 🎶[Bad, bad company, 'til the day I die](https://open.spotify.com/track/2KZXCH4npY28gtZKXcB2N8?si=f8e1634618c94377) 🎶

CW: Being as morally grey/jaded as he is, be aware that he could do some awful things. 

My first collab! T_T so many amazing people, can't wait for y'all to meet the whole gang! yeehaw! >:3
***
[Collab Rentry link with lorebook updates, etc.](https://rentry.co/LosDesgraciados)

**Other members of Los Desgraciados (more to be added):**
